title: rhododendron coryanum
intro: Rhododendron coryanum, also known as the Himalayan rhododendron or blue-petaled rhododendron, is a species of flowering plant in the family Ericaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Rhododendron coryanum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support respiratory health, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of Rhododendron coryanum include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of ailments, from colds and flu to skin conditions and digestive problems.
